source_context: Academic assignment help service — monetizes by providing NEBOSH assignment writing assistance, model answers, open book exam guidance, and unit-specific tutoring for students pursuing NEBOSH qualifications
central_search_intent: Students seeking expert help to complete, understand, or pass NEBOSH assignment units and open book exams across all NEBOSH qualification levels

inside_border: NEBOSH qualifications (IGC, NGC, Diploma, Fire, Environmental, HSW, PSM, Construction)
NEBOSH assignment units (IG1, IG2, NG1, NG2, DN1, FC1, EC1, HSW1)
NEBOSH open book exams (OBE) and practical assessments
NEBOSH marking criteria, assessment guidance, word count requirements
NEBOSH model answers and sample assignments

Health and safety concepts as they relate directly to NEBOSH assignment content
Risk assessment frameworks within NEBOSH unit scope
NEBOSH qualification structure, registration, and grading
outside_border: Generic health and safety content unconnected to NEBOSH assignments
IOSH, CITB, ROSPA qualifications as primary topics (comparison context only)
General academic essay writing not NEBOSH-specific
Workplace safety legislation as standalone topics (only valid as NEBOSH unit context)
HR management, occupational psychology as independent topics
topical_border_definition.competitor_border_risk: Competitors may expand into 'health and safety assignment help' broadly — defend border by going deeper on NEBOSH unit-specific content rather than going broad into generic health and safety

vastness_depth_momentum.vastness_assessment: The topical map covers all major NEBOSH qualification types at Core Tier 1 (IGC, NGC, Diploma, OBE, Online). Outer section covers qualification discovery, legislation, and management systems. Gaps exist at PSM, HSW, and Diploma variant levels. Vastness is functional but not maximal — 6 gap topics identified that would extend the border.
vastness_depth_momentum.depth_assessment: Core Tier 1 topics have strong EAV depth defined (unit structure, marking criteria, command words, legislation). Tier 2 topics have sufficient depth definitions. The largest depth gap is the absence of Examiner Report analysis content — this is the most unique depth signal available in this niche and should be prioritised.
vastness_depth_momentum.momentum_recommendation: Publish Core Tier 1 and high-priority Tier 2 topics first (weeks 1-3). Move to Outer Tier 1 qualification comparison and discovery content (weeks 4-5). Fill gap topics identified in coverage_gaps (weeks 6-8). Aim for minimum 2 core section pages per week to maintain crawl prioritisation.
vastness_depth_momentum.priority_recommendation: Depth first, then Vastness. The market likely has many thin 'NEBOSH assignment help' pages. Differentiate by going deeper on unit-specific content (IG1 model answers, IG2 practical guidance, examiner report breakdowns) before expanding width. Once depth is established across Core Tier 1 and 2, expand Outer Section for historical data propagation.
